title: Define EOVERFLOW in portable link errno header
description: Host/non-Zephyr syntax checking of lichen/subsys/lichen/link/link_ctx.c fails because lichen/subsys/lichen/link/include/lichen/errno.h documents EOVERFLOW as POSIX value 75 but does not define it in the non-Zephyr block. Add the missing portable definition or otherwise make -EOVERFLOW available consistently without relying on external headers.
